title: Immunopeptidomic analyses of RAW 264.7 macrophages
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4i055","text":"Here, we describe protocols for a novel proteogenomic approach to identify MHC I–associated peptides from RAW 264.7 cells after LPS stimulation. These antigens are rare and are most effectively identified with a mass spectrometry–based approach, which allows the direct sampling and sequencing of these peptides.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Lilia Rodriguez
